name: Lady of D.
name_jp: ドラゴン・ウィッチ－ドラゴンの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>護</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ご</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
desc: Your opponent cannot target face-up Dragon-Type monsters you control for attacks. If this card on the field would be destroyed by battle or by a card effect, you can send 1 Dragon-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard instead.
mnst_eff: Your opponent cannot target face-up Dragon-Type monsters you control for attacks. If this card on the field would be destroyed by battle or by a card effect, you can send 1 Dragon-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard instead.
eff: Your opponent cannot target face-up Dragon-Type monsters you control for attacks. If this card on the field would be destroyed by battle or by a card effect, you can send 1 Dragon-Type monster from your hand to the Graveyard instead.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
attack: Prevents other cards being targeted for attacks
